title: Electronic Throttle Body / Idle Air Volume Relearn
description: Relearn base throttle and idle airflow values after throttle cleaning, battery replacement, ECM reset, or throttle body replacement.
physical_solution: Reset ECU throttle adaptation values so the engine learns the correct idle baseline. Required after throttle body cleaning, replacement, or ECM reset.

technical_solution.elm327_feasibility: Partial — many OEMs accessible via $31 routine; some require exact ignition/pedal timing sequence without scan tool
preconditions: Engine at operating temperature unless OEM specifies cold start

procedure_steps.description: Confirm no active throttle/ETC DTCs. Clear any non-relevant codes first.
Execute idle/throttle relearn routine: $31 01 [OEM_ROUTINE_ID]. See oem_notes for OEM-specific paths.
Poll routine completion: $31 03 [OEM_ROUTINE_ID]. Confirm positive response.
Start engine, allow 2-minute idle stabilization. Monitor idle RPM via live data.
Road test with light decel/idle events. Confirm no stalling, surge, or ETC MIL return.

oem_notes.Toyota/Lexus: Often auto-learns after key cycles and warm idle. Techstream has explicit utility for some ECUs.
oem_notes.Honda/Acura: Idle learn requires warm-up and fan-cycle conditions. Some models relearn passively after ECM reset.
oem_notes.Nissan/Infiniti: IAVL: exact pedal/ignition timing sequence required. No scan tool needed on many models — turn ignition on, wait 3s, press/release pedal 5x, wait 7s, hold pedal down, wait 10s for 3 blinks.
oem_notes.Hyundai/Kia: GDS guided idle relearn on many models. Passive learning may require specific drive/idle profile.
oem_notes.Ford: Idle trim relearns over drive cycle. Forced relearn in IDS/FDRS on selected platforms.
oem_notes.GM: Usually self-learns. Scan-tool reset used after cleaning or component replacement via $31.
oem_notes.BMW: DME adaptations: reset then drive cycle. Stable voltage support strongly recommended.
oem_notes.VW/Audi: Basic settings for throttle body adaptation via $31. Check VCDS channel for specific controller.
oem_notes.Stellantis: Pre-2018: $31 accessible. 2018+ SGW may block — attempt via HS-CAN first.
